e1.outerLoopFocusH: ~32 (calibrated from Phase 1 norm: 14 stories × 2.3h/story; formula 2×2×0.50=2h overridden by norm)
e1.assumptions: GitHub Actions only; no Bitbucket enterprise; ~14 stories; pipeline evolution debt D1-D9+B1 included in count; outer loop ~2 calendar days matching Phase 1 baseline
e1.premiumRequestsForecast: ~322 (14 × 23/story Phase 1 rate) — exceeds current period remainder; inner loop uses refreshed May quota

e2.outerLoopFocusH: ~30h (13 stories × 2.3h/story Phase 1 norm; formula output 2h overridden by norm)
e2.notes: Story count 14→13: p2.5 split 1→2 stories, no other scope additions. Complexity C1×3 (p2.1-p2.3: SKILL.md text changes only), C2×10 (remainder). E5 stories p2.11/p2.12 written as C3 but operator specifies C2 avg for estimate. Calendar span holds at 2 days; p75FocusH/story = 2.88h vs Phase 1 actuals of 2.3h/story (expected increase for C2 vs C1 mix).

actuals.notes: JSONL session logs were not accessible from this workspace. Tier-1 ISO timestamps are present on some Phase 2 blocks but review and DoR timestamps remain inconsistent, so E3 was rerun using a manual calendar override of Apr 11 start to Apr 12 end = 2 days. Per estimate skill fallback, totalCalendarH = calendarDays × 2 = 4h and outerLoopFocusH = 4h × 0.25 = 1h. Treat as medium-low confidence until telemetry-complete E3 is possible.

flowFindings.title: State timestamp consistency gap
flowFindings.actual: Discovery/benefit-metric blocks have valid ISO datetimes, but review and DoR timestamps remain inconsistent enough that manual Apr 11 to Apr 12 override was required
flowFindings.estimate: Tier-1 ISO timestamps should permit direct phase-span reconstruction with no manual intervention
flowFindings.delta: Tier-1 derivation partially usable but not complete
flowFindings.causeHypothesis: Phase updates were written with mixed date values across sessions before the timestamp discipline was fully applied
flowFindings.improvement: Add a state-write guard that validates monotonic phase timestamps before commit and rejects month drift

flowFindings.title: Session telemetry access gap
flowFindings.actual: JSONL debug logs unavailable in workspace context
flowFindings.causeHypothesis: Telemetry path not mounted in current execution environment
flowFindings.improvement: Persist per-session wall-clock totals into workspace/state.json at checkpoint time

flowFindings.title: Outer-loop estimate variance high
flowFindings.causeHypothesis: Fallback method still understates active time when session telemetry is missing, even after manual calendar correction
flowFindings.improvement: Require telemetry-complete E3 before using deltas for forecast calibration
